title: Server crash when trying to delete a table has been added to a merge table with "cascade" at the end
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE joe1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50));
CREATE TABLE joe2 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT 0.00);
CREATE TABLE joe3 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO joe3 (id, description) VALUES (1, 'Description for joe3');
ALTER TABLE joe3 ADD CONSTRAINT fk_joe1 FOREIGN KEY (id) REFERENCES joe1(id);
key_bug_features: drop table with cascade on a merge table
